title: VimFu — Recipe: Move Code Around
description: Use :m to move a block of lines to another location. Reorganize functions or sections with line ranges.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with functions in wrong order

steps.say: These functions are in the wrong order. Setup should come first. The m command moves lines.
Turn on line numbers to see the range.
Move setup on lines 10 through 12 to after line 0, which means the top of the file.
Setup is now at the top. The other functions shifted down. No cutting and pasting needed.
Colon range m destination. Move any block of lines anywhere in the file.
